layout_settings.section_h2: 25,000 sq ft of Club-inspired Lifestyle Amenities
layout_settings.section_text: Whether it’s recreation, leisure, relaxation, or social gathering, the amenities invite residents to live fully, with dedicated spaces and programs for wellness, community and connection, or quiet reflection.

layouts.caption: Yoga mats for wellness
layouts.title: Health & Wellness
layouts.text: A light-filled fitness center, yoga studio, and outdoor pool framed by greenery nurture vitality and calm in equal measure.
layouts.list:
Yoga mats
Aromatherapy
Meditation
Fine herbs
Vegan food
Soy milk
Kale burgers

layouts.caption: A caption about pools and spas
layouts.title: Retreat & Relax
layouts.text: From sauna to steam, lounge to sun deck, Park Row provides restorative spaces for body and mind.
layouts.list:
Pool toys
Sauna
Steam room
Salt water
Fresh water

content.title: Social Gathering & Community
content.text: Elegant lounges, landscaped terraces, and private dining rooms designed for connection—celebrating Bellevue’s gracious way of life.

content.title:
Private Dining
& Entertaining
content.text: An elegant setting for intimate occasions and memorable gatherings. The private dining room feels both exclusive and inviting. Whether celebrating with family or hosting among friends, every detail reflects the art of gracious living.
